ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "sport_description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_number" TEXT /* Player number */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_description" TEXT /* Description of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "opp_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the opposing team */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sport */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the venue */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "match_description" TEXT /* Description of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the player
Height of the player in meters
Weight of the player in kilograms
Unique identifier for the opposing team
